articles.title: Janhvi Kapoor Peddi Controversy: Jaya Bachchan Spills Old Secrets, Kangana Ranaut Jumps In

articles.title: ‘Poverty does not ask a child’s age’: Woman’s simple conversation with a young boy offers a powerful lesson on struggle, strength and family responsibility
articles.description: A young boy, around 12 or 13, was found working at a puncture repair shop during his summer vacation. He explained that his father is ill, and his mother works as a laborer, forcing him to contribute to the family's income. This encounter highlighted how poverty compels children to shoulder adult responsibilities prematurely.

articles.description: Mohanlal's 'Drishyam 3' has seen a box office slowdown, collecting ₹50 lakh on Monday. Despite a strong opening, the film's total India net collections stand at ₹106.93 crore. The family suspense thriller, now a successful film producer, revisits Georgekutty's seemingly peaceful life, hinting at lingering unresolved fears and memories.

articles.title: Guns N' Roses Announces India Return With Two Concerts: Venues, Tickets, Dates and Everything You Need to Know

articles.title: “BTS works in an organic and fluid way": Football fans make BTS’ “Dynamite” the unofficial anthem of the FIFA World Cup online
articles.description: BTS’ hit song “Dynamite” has unexpectedly become part of a viral FIFA World Cup trend on TikTok and X. Football fans are using the track in South Korea-themed match edits, with several clips reportedly crossing 500,000 likes. The trend sparked hilarious reactions from ARMY members, many surprised that even non-K-pop fans know the song. Social media users say the crossover feels natural, proving BTS’ global cultural influence continues to stretch far beyond music and into sports culture.

articles.title: Kangana says 'love at first sight is nonsense'; shares marriage advice
articles.description: Actor-politician Kangana Ranaut has shared her candid views on love, marriage and modern relationships, arguing that social media has created unrealistic expectations that often do more harm than good. Speaking in a recent interview, Kangana said that relationships are deeply personal and cannot be measured against the picture-perfect romances often seen online.

articles.title: Who is Oblivion? Viral Japan livestream sparks Johnny Somali comparisons after dramatic FamilyMart confrontation
articles.description: Kick streamer Oblivion sparked controversy during a June 8 livestream in Japan after being removed from a FamilyMart store and questioned by police over filming. The incident happened while he was traveling with Ryan Garcia. Social media users compared Oblivion to Johnny Somali, while the episode also renewed conversations about privacy rules and streamer behavior in Japan.

articles.description: Lewis Hamilton has intensified speculation about his rumored romance with Kim Kardashian by sharing a behind-the-scenes photo from the Monaco Grand Prix. The image features Kardashian posing with Hamilton's distinctive pink Ferrari helmet, further fueling fan excitement. This follows Hamilton's affectionate gesture towards Kardashian after his podium finish, suggesting their relationship is progressing.

articles.title: "She catfishes men": Kayla Nicole under fire again as Travis Kelce and Taylor Swift fans spark brutal online debate

Fans and critics clashed across social media, with some blaming Taylor Swift’s fanbase for the attacks. The controversy grew further as Travis Kelce and Taylor Swift wedding rumors continued dominating headlines online.

articles.title: "Hope they go bankrupt": Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce ignite massive social media war over bizarre $6,000 obsession
articles.description: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce sparked massive online controversy after a bizarre $6,000 frenzy went viral across social media. Fans flooded the internet with memes, creepy jokes, and harsh criticism, with many calling the obsession surrounding the celebrity couple “peak modern madness.” Others mocked how far celebrity culture has gone, while some defended the hype surrounding one of the world’s most talked-about power couples. The viral reactions quickly turned the situation into another internet spectacle tied to Swift and Kelce’s growing influence.

articles.title: Are Tiger Woods and Vanessa Trump on the Verge of Breakup? Here's What Reports Say
articles.description: Recent reports suggest that Tiger Woods and Vanessa Trump are not on the verge of a breakup despite facing major personal challenges. Woods continues to focus on recovery following legal troubles and ongoing health concerns, while Trump is undergoing treatment after publicly revealing a breast cancer diagnosis. Sources close to the couple say they maintain a strong emotional connection and regularly communicate to support one another.

articles.title: Born in Bihar, he became one of the greatest writers in English language, but he was not Indian
articles.description: George Orwell, born Eric Arthur Blair in Motihari, British India, became a celebrated British writer. His classics, Animal Farm and 1984, remain influential. Orwell's life included service in India and experiences in the Spanish Civil War. He married twice and adopted a son. His predictions about surveillance in 1984 proved remarkably accurate.

articles.title: Matthew Stafford and Kelly Stafford combined net worth in 2026: Career earnings, endorsements, investments, real estate, and car collection
articles.description: Matthew Stafford and wife Kelly Stafford are enjoying summer with close friends. Their family life remains a major talking point even in offseason. The couple’s substantial net worth is estimated between $151 million and $161 million. It is largely attributed to Matthew’s lucrative NFL contracts with the Detroit Lions and Los Angeles Rams. He is the first $400 million player in NFL history. Followed by Aaron Rodgers, Kirk Cousins, Jared Goff, Russell Wilson, and more.
